# Data Dictionary — Epi Data Ingestion Pipeline

**Project:** Epidemiologic Data Ingestion Pipeline — SAS, R, and Python  
**Datasets:** Three synthetic public health data sources, seed=123  
**Generated by:** `code/python/00_generate_synthetic_data.py`

---

## Dataset 1: Hospital Discharge Records

**File:** `data/raw/hospital_discharge_records.csv` → `data/clean/hospital_discharge_clean.csv`  
**Raw rows:** 1,500 (includes 75 deliberate MRN+admit_date duplicates)  
**Clean rows:** 1,425 (after removing 75 duplicates)  
**Unit:** One row = one inpatient discharge encounter

| # | Variable | Type | Raw Values | Clean Values | Notes |
|---|----------|------|-----------|--------------|-------|
| 1 | `mrn` | String | MRN000001–MRN001500 | Same | Medical record number; ~5% true duplicates (same MRN + same admit_date) in raw |
| 2 | `admit_date` | String/Date | YYYY-MM-DD | Date ISO 8601 | Admission date |
| 3 | `discharge_date` | String/Date | YYYY-MM-DD | Date ISO 8601 | Discharge date; must be ≥ admit_date |
| 4 | `los_days` | Integer | ≥ 1 | ≥ 1 | Length of stay in days |
| 5 | `primary_dx_icd10` | String | ICD-10-CM codes | Same | Primary diagnosis code |
| 6 | `secondary_dx_icd10` | String | ICD-10-CM codes or blank | Same or NULL | Secondary diagnosis; may be missing |
| 7 | `patient_age` | Mixed | 18–89; 999 (sentinel); -1 (sentinel) | 18–89 or NULL | Age in years; sentinels 999 and -1 set to NULL (~22 rows) |
| 8 | `patient_sex` | String | M, F, U, Male, Female, 1, 2, MALE | Male, Female, Unknown | All values standardised; see coding rules |
| 9 | `patient_zip` | String | 5-digit; 00000 (invalid) | 5-digit | 00000 flagged as invalid (`zip_valid=0`); value retained |
| 10 | `facility_id` | String | FAC001–FAC020 | Same | Reporting facility identifier |
| 11 | `county_fips` | String | 5-digit FIPS (01001–01050) | Same | County FIPS code for geographic linkage |

**Derived variables (added in cleaning):**

| Variable | Rule |
|----------|------|
| `admit_date_parsed` | `admit_date` cast to date type |
| `discharge_date_parsed` | `discharge_date` cast to date type |
| `los_calculated` | `discharge_date_parsed − admit_date_parsed` (days) |
| `admit_year` | Year extracted from `admit_date_parsed` |
| `sex_clean` | Standardised from `patient_sex` (see coding rules) |
| `age_valid` | 1 if 0 ≤ age ≤ 120, 0 if sentinel/out-of-range; invalid ages → NULL |
| `zip_valid` | 1 if 5-digit numeric and ≠ 00000, else 0 |
| `is_duplicate` | 1 if MRN + admit_date duplicated; duplicates removed (keep first) |

**Sex coding rules (raw → clean):**

| Raw | Clean |
|-----|-------|
| M, MALE, Male, 1 | Male |
| F, FEMALE, Female, 2 | Female |
| U, Unknown, UNK, blank, NULL | Unknown |

---

## Dataset 2: Reportable Disease Registry

**File:** `data/raw/reportable_disease_registry.csv` → `data/clean/registry_clean.csv`  
**Rows:** 800  
**Unit:** One row = one confirmed reportable disease case

| # | Variable | Type | Raw Values | Clean Values | Notes |
|---|----------|------|-----------|--------------|-------|
| 1 | `case_id` | String | CASE0000001–CASE0000800 | Same | Unique case identifier |
| 2 | `report_date` | String | YYYY-MM-DD or MM/DD/YYYY (mixed) | Date ISO 8601 | ~115 rows (14%) use MM/DD/YYYY; standardised in cleaning |
| 3 | `condition_name` | String | Salmonella, Campylobacter, etc. | Same | Reportable enteric condition |
| 4 | `icd10_code` | String | ICD-10 code | Same | Corresponding ICD-10 code |
| 5 | `patient_age` | Integer/Float | 0–89 or NULL | 0–89 or NULL | 10 rows missing |
| 6 | `patient_sex` | String | Male, Female, Unknown | Same | Already standardised in source |
| 7 | `county_fips` | String | 5-digit FIPS (01001–01050) | 5-digit FIPS | County of case report; same universe as population denominators |
| 8 | `outbreak_id` | String | OB0001–OB0011 or NULL | Same | Outbreak ID; NULL = sporadic case |
| 9 | `hospitalized` | String | Yes, No, Unknown | Yes, No, Unknown | Hospitalisation status |
| 10 | `died` | String | Yes, No, Unknown | Yes, No, Unknown | Death status |
| 11 | `source_lab` | String | State Lab, Private Lab A/B, Hospital Lab | Same | Reporting laboratory |

**Derived variables (added in cleaning):**

| Variable | Rule |
|----------|------|
| `report_date` | Parsed from raw regardless of format (ISO or MM/DD/YYYY) |
| `report_year` | Year extracted from parsed date |
| `is_outbreak_case` | 1 if `outbreak_id` is not NULL, else 0 |
| `hospitalized_bin` | 1=Yes, 0=No, NULL=Unknown |
| `died_bin` | 1=Yes, 0=No, NULL=Unknown |
| `age_missing` | 1 if `patient_age` is NULL, else 0 |

---

## Dataset 3: Population Denominators

**File:** `data/raw/population_denominators.csv`  
**Rows:** 200 (50 counties × 4 years = 200 rows)  
**Unit:** One row = one county × one year

| # | Variable | Type | Values | Notes |
|---|----------|------|--------|-------|
| 1 | `county_fips` | String | 5-digit FIPS (01001–01050) | Same 50-county universe as registry and discharge |
| 2 | `year` | Integer | 2020–2023 | Calendar year |
| 3 | `population_total` | Integer | 5,000–250,000 | Total county population |
| 4 | `population_male` | Integer | ~48–52% of total | Male population |
| 5 | `population_female` | Integer | ~48–52% of total | Female population |
| 6 | `population_under18` | Integer | ~20–28% of total | Population under 18 |
| 7 | `population_65plus` | Integer | ~12–20% of total | Population 65 and older |
| 8 | `data_source` | String | 'US Census ACS 5-Year Estimates (Simulated)' | Source attribution |

---

## Master Incidence Dataset

**File:** `data/clean/master_incidence_dataset.csv`  
**Rows:** 624 (county × year × condition combinations with at least one case)  
**Unit:** One row = one county × year × condition

| Variable | Type | Description |
|----------|------|-------------|
| `county_fips` | String | 5-digit county FIPS code |
| `year` | Integer | Calendar year (2020–2023) |
| `condition_name` | String | Reportable enteric condition |
| `case_count` | Integer | Confirmed cases in that county-year-condition cell |
| `hospitalized_n` | Float | Number of hospitalisations (from registry) |
| `hospitalized_unk` | Integer | Number of cases with unknown hospitalisation status |
| `died_n` | Float | Number of deaths |
| `died_unk` | Integer | Number of cases with unknown death status |
| `outbreak_cases` | Integer | Number of outbreak-associated cases |
| `population_total` | Integer | County population denominator (from Census file) |
| `incidence_rate_100k` | Float | Cases per 100,000 population |
| `hospitalized_pct` | Float | Percentage of cases hospitalised |
| `case_fatality_pct` | Float | Percentage of cases who died |

---

## ICD-10 Reference

| ICD-10 Code | Condition | Category |
|-------------|-----------|----------|
| A02.0 | Salmonella enteritis | Enteric |
| A04.5 | Campylobacter enteritis | Enteric |
| A03.9 | Shigellosis | Enteric |
| B15.9 | Hepatitis A | Viral hepatitis |
| A32.9 | Listeriosis | Enteric |
| A04.3 | Enterohemorrhagic E. coli (O157:H7) | Enteric |
| A07.2 | Cryptosporidiosis | Enteric |
| A05.4 | Vibrio food poisoning | Enteric |
| J18.9 | Pneumonia, unspecified | Respiratory (discharge dataset only) |
| E11.9 | Type 2 diabetes mellitus | Endocrine (discharge dataset only) |
| I10 | Essential hypertension | Cardiovascular (discharge dataset only) |
| I25.10 | Atherosclerotic heart disease | Cardiovascular (discharge dataset only) |
| J44.1 | COPD with acute exacerbation | Respiratory (discharge dataset only) |
| N18.3 | Chronic kidney disease, stage 3 | Renal (discharge dataset only) |
| C34.10 | Malignant neoplasm, upper lobe bronchus/lung | Neoplasm (discharge dataset only) |
